scripts.prepare:public: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path public/assets) { Remove-Item public/assets -Recurse -Force }; Copy-Item assets public/assets -Recurse; if (!(Test-Path public/styles)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory public/styles | Out-Null }; Copy-Item styles/main.css public/styles/main.css -Force"
scripts.dev: npm run sass && npm run prepare:public && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED='1'; npx astro dev"
scripts.build: npm run sass && npm run prepare:public && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED='1'; npx astro build"
